title.en: The Heavy Bone God will stare at Ye Tian and sa...

content.en:
"That's right!"

The Heavy Bone God will stare at Ye Tian and say in a deep voice.

"Yes, but not everyone can challenge me, if you want to challenge me, you have to add some color. If you win, I lose you 100 Dao, and if I win, you lose 100 Dao, what if I win?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

100 Dao Coins?

When many gods heard this, they were shocked.

This is not a small amount, most of the gods have a total net worth of only a few Dao coins, and those with a small net worth even only have only one Dao coin.

The big bet of 100 coins will make even the strong people of Destiny feel distressed!

The Heavy Bone God General frowned, as a seven-star God General, he has a very high status in the Canglang Sea, and there are many opportunities, so his net worth is very rich, and he can also get 100 coins.

But for him, 100 coins is also a huge fortune, if he wins, he will make a big profit, but if he loses, he will lose miserably.

This is undoubtedly a big gamble!

Bet?

The Heavy Bone God General was a little hesitant, although he was confident that he would defeat Ye Tian, but he was afraid of what happened!

The bet was made by Ye Tian, which shows that Ye Tian has enough confidence!

But if he didn't gamble, he wouldn't be able to challenge Ye Tian today, and he would even be laughed at.

"Okay, I'm betting!"

The Heavy Bone God will say.

In front of the Void Heaven Temple.

The other gods and the Heavenly Monarch dispersed, while Peng Yu Tianjun and the others joined forces to arrange the enchantment, allowing Ye Tian to fight with the Heavy Bone Divine General, so that it would not cause too much damage.

Otherwise, this area will be blown up by the two.

Within the enchantment.

Ye Tian and the Heavy Bone God General looked at each other, and immediately fought.

The Heavy Bone God General activated a great divine power, and his whole body was wrapped in black bones, causing his defense to skyrocket.

Immediately after, a black bone hammer also appeared in the hand of the Heavy Bone God General.

I saw that the Heavy Bone God slammed a hammer at Ye Tian.

In a flash.

Bang!!!!

The void exploded, and the terrifying power swept in.

And at this time, Ye Tian was also slashed with one sword, showing the power of the Seven Star Divine General.

In the first battle, the Heavy Bone God General did not move at all, and the powerful physical defense directly resisted those impacts, while Ye Tian's Void Heaven Dao Body did not use it, but it also invisibly annihilated the power of that impact.

In the next moment, the two really fought.

The speed of the two was incomparably fast, and they collided countless times in every instant.

The Heavy Bone God General seems to be bulky, but his speed is not slow at all, and although Ye Tian has not used the Constant Light Divine Power, his speed is not slow at all, and he of the Void Heaven Dao Body seems to be born with divine speed, which is extremely fast.

"Great Immortal Technique!"

"Great Destruction!"

Ye Tian really broke out his strength.

Although these two great supernatural powers did not increase his attack power much, their combat ability skyrocketed.

Allowing the Heavy Bone Divine General's attack to fall on his body, Ye Tian did not react at all, the Great Immortal Technique made him ignore such attacks, and the injuries caused by the Great Destruction Technique were not easy to recover.

Gradually, the Heavy Bone God will begin to weaken.

"Great Immortal Technique, Great Destruction Technique!"

The Heavy Bone God's eyes were filled with shock and disbelief.

This is the top 100 of the three thousand divine powers, if any god general is trained in one of them, it is enough to make countless god generals and heavenly monarchs envious.

And Ye Tian not only practiced, but also practiced two, and both of them have reached the realm of Dacheng, which is also one of Ye Tian's progress over the years.

The Void Heaven Palace.

Peng Yu Tianjun's pupils also shrank, and he suddenly felt incredible.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi actually practiced the Great Immortal Destruction Technique and the Great Destruction Technique, and he just used the Constant Light Divine Power, both of which are very powerful Divine Powers. He, how did he do it?"

Peng Yu Tianjun was curious.

After all, Ye Tian is a native creature of the Great Universe, and he has never entered the chaos, and he can cultivate so many top-notch great divine powers just within the Great Universe, this talent is terrifying.

No, I should say that the chance is terrible!

He has also practiced some great supernatural powers and even chaotic supernatural powers, but they are all supernatural powers that cannot be ranked, and they are far from being compared with supernatural powers such as the Great Immortal Technique and the Great Destruction Technique.

"Heavy bones!"

The heavy bone god general also worked hard, and his body instantly turned into a skeleton, this is his heavy bone body, which was integrated into the bones with the strength of his whole body, casting a heavy bone and bone body, and his combat power skyrocketed.

However, in the face of Ye Tian's several great supernatural powers, the Heavy Bone Divine General was still unable to compete.

As time passed, the heavy bone body of the Heavy Bone God General was directly cracked.

When the fall is imminent, the Heavy Bone God will admit defeat.

"Wanfa Daozi, I admit defeat!"

The Heavy Bone God will be lonely.

Once he admits defeat, he will lose face, not to mention, he will lose 100 Dao coins, which is a huge loss!

But if he doesn't admit defeat, he will probably be beaten to death by Ye Tian!

He also had a general understanding of Ye Tian's strength.

Although Ye Tian is ranked 94th on the list of talented god generals, even if he is the eighty-ninth god general on the god list list, even if his combat power is stronger than Ye Tian, he may be consumed alive by Ye Tian.

The Heavy Bone God will regret it very much, why do you have to challenge Ye Tian!

After being hit hard this time, I'm afraid it will take a long time to fully recover, and the ancestral monument space is about to open, and if he recovers from his injuries and then challenges it, it will be too late.

This means that this time the ancestral monument space has nothing to do with him.

"Heavy Bone God General, 100 coins, take it!"

Ye Tian said seriously.

The Heavy Bone God didn't dare not give it, so he took out dozens of Dao coins from the storage space, and took out some Chaos Spirit Treasures, resources, and ores, which were enough to make up 100 treasures worth Dao Coins, and then handed them over to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian took a look, estimated the value, and after confirming that these were enough for 100 Dao coins, he put them away.

"Heavy Bone God General, welcome to challenge at any time!"

Ye Tian laughed.

The Heavy Bone God quickly turned around and left, not daring to linger any longer.

Subsequently, the news of the failure of the challenge spread by the Heavy Bone God, and it did not cause much sensation.

After all, Ye Tian's ranking was already higher than that of the Heavy Bone God General, and there was more than one place higher, so it was normal for him to win.

However, some of the Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs who knew the battle situation really realized Ye Tian's horror.

In this battle, Ye Tian fully exposed three great divine powers, all of which belonged to the three thousand great divine powers.

In a flash, decades have passed.

On this day, the ancestral monument space was opened.
